title: athyrium venulosum
intro: Athyrium venulosum, also known as the net veined lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Athyrium venulosum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Athyrium venulosum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
